note: Anonymized right-profile cephalometrics sample for PDF chin guide overlays. Sourced from assessments.analysis.cvReport.profile.primary (id hash only). convexityPoints and eLine are normalized image coords (0–1). nasoAural here is the legacy raw-point shape; current pipeline stores nasoAural as 0–100 percent horizontals/segments via build_naso_aural_proportion_overlay.

pdfChinGuides.topFrame: One vertical at/just past Pn; four horizontals from soft-tissue Sn / stomion / labiomental / Pog to that vertical (Image-2 chin-show).
pdfChinGuides.bottomFrame: Pitched profile (~7° CW for rightProfile); verticals only at Pn + lip plane (slight left nudge). No horizontals / E-line.
